entries.name: fs-readme
entries.description: Reference host plugin — reads the workspace README and returns a preview via a Node JSON-RPC sidecar.

entries.name: pg-browser
entries.description: v1 rewrite of the legacy in-process database panel. A Node sidecar connects to PostgreSQL and exposes list/query commands — now installable, permission-gated, and sandboxed like any third-party plugin.
